reading.title: Reading: A market story
reading.passage: I bought some fruit and a new bag at the market. I thought it was a little expensive, but I bought it anyway. I told my sister, and she gave me some advice about the colour.

questions.question: The writer thought the bag was cheap.
questions.explanation: "I thought it was a little expensive".

questions.question: Who gave advice about the colour?
questions.explanation: "she gave me some advice about the colour".

reading.title: Reading: An old museum
reading.passage: They built this museum about a hundred years ago. I found some old photographs and letters inside. The exhibition began last month, and a lot of visitors came to see it.

questions.question: The museum was built recently.
questions.explanation: "They built this museum about a hundred years ago."
